textByHash.5c37063a08ef1f4010edb88b6b03a375a98edb91: I hear you are questing for the Holy Grail?!
textByHash.a11f372c8a4a06c7c88b6ed27c3c504bf773da35: I will wreak havoc upon those worthless Sinclairs. Betraying their father's wishes like that, it's despicable.
textByHash.78fa518dcd695c5380063991797ca57f35ed5042: I saw a grate high up on the wall of the cell. I think someone could slip through that, but I'm not sure how they would reach it.
textByHash.783d45b84f5b5f26b9e6317f06189f72cc257a60: How are you going to get all of us out of here?
textByHash.c7e204ced25d4dbf0fb4fb61b8c847d0b0b98e48: They shall pay for what they have done.
textByHash.87d4462c9914e4fcf4edfe878399ded32f682cf9: I shall avenge Arthur for this misdeed!
textByHash.9f96003218ea207155be71e1e5f938fbbf7f8f34: The only person I know of who would possibly have been of help is Merlin...
textByHash.204ce576d6900a3a7299469e5b176719bbd8b03f: I am well aware of that, adventurer.
textByHash.5eb9e1a7f89534c29aa4a8020c584fd56775faf0: Mordred... So you think he may be involved with the curse upon Merlin?
textByHash.db5e8fe74beb87b8732562aad65cb4fcf46640bb: I think that you may be onto something there. Unfortunately his fortress is impregnable!
textByHash.f737beb7f795c8b14edcd0ef4605b703ca9c8fdd: An adventurer eh? There is no service finer than serving the bountiful King Arthur, and I happen to know there's an important quest to fulfill.
textByHash.8e2b7b5c81d60aa8c105287138a6ed82fdb1a4bc: Sir Knight! Many thanks for your assistance in restoring Merlin to his former freedom!
textByHash.f47a8cdd785d3623060781a6f82e619b707a099d: We owe you a great debt for freeing us from that dungeon.
textByHash.ab512efa8593ad55a8507f8574a0fc65125bbe0b: I have a question for you.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
